purpose: Open a public civic-metadata court stack for routing claims through receipts, humor, boundary checks, and zero-trust validation.

court_stack.name: JOY Court
asks: Does this claim create joy without fake authority?
Does it help a stranger verify the repo?

court_stack.name: MEME Court
asks: Can a normal person understand this in one pass?
Does the meme clarify instead of deceive?
Does the joke carry a receipt?

court_stack.name: CLOWN Court
asks: Is someone pretending a vibe is a receipt?
Is the title bigger than the evidence?
Would this collapse under public laughter?

backing_layers.Dad_Public_Website: public front door and plain-language receipts
backing_layers.metadata: machine-readable JSON state and audit lanes
backing_layers.AL: Alabama / ALMS lead test case and boundary inquiry lane
backing_layers.Ms_Wisdom_OODA: family-facing observe-orient-decide-act loop for boundaries, receipts, and public clarity

orient: route through JOY, MEME, GOBLIN, and CLOWN Court filters
decide: hold external anchors until real receipts exist
reject authority claims without scope and appeal
act: run verifier or mark runtime receipt missing
update audit log when pass/fail is visible

receipt_rule: No court ruling is green unless it names a repo path, commit SHA, validation state, and appeal/correction path.
